title: What's in Store
excerpt: In November while in Chicago for Ahpo’s funeral, we stopped into a couple craft stores. Since finding out that Michaels had the Sketchbook collection pad under the Recollections label, I still had not yet seen it for myself in an…
body:
In November while in Chicago for Ahpo’s funeral, we stopped into a couple craft stores. Since finding out that Michaels had the Sketchbook collection pad under the Recollections label, I still had not yet seen it for myself in an actual store. The hotel was close to a Target and a Michaels (location location location) and as I walked down the aisle, I spotted it.

That's my tired but thrilled look. Which is utterly similar to this one, after spotting a section in the front window of Archiver's Niles location.

It's still pretty surreal. Loved seeing Sn@p! products across the way.
